description: Plots data from a table using columns as x and y coordinates, supporting curve or point visualization
utility: Visualize table data as a plot on a graph

arguments.name: graph
arguments.description: Graph container to draw plot in

arguments.name: yColumn
arguments.description: 1-based column index for y values (default: 2, uses column 1 as x)

arguments.name: plotType
arguments.description: type(curve) for smooth curve (default) or type(points) for discrete points with labels

alternates.description: Uses column 1 as x, column 2 as y, draws smooth curve
Uses column 1 as x, column 3 as y
